nasb.text: The inner court had a gate toward the south; and he measured from gate to gate toward the south, a hundred cubits.

esv.text: And there was a gate on the south of the inner court. And he measured from gate to gate toward the south, a hundred cubits.

cnv.text: 內院南面也有門；他從這門量到南門，共有五十公尺。

ccb.text: 内院也有南门，与外院南门之间的距离是五十米。
